name: My Texas Payday
description_short: Canadian payday lender expanding into Texas offering fast emergency loans online with same-day or next-day funding and in-person application assistance.
description_long:
My Texas Payday is a payday lending company that entered the Texas market as an expansion of an established Canadian lending operation dating back to 2008. The company operates primarily online, requiring customers to complete loan applications through their website to receive funding, though they maintain a physical location in Houston for in-person consultation and application assistance.

The company positions itself as a quick-access liquidity provider for consumers facing immediate financial needs. They emphasize fast funding timelines (same-day or next-day based on category positioning) and claim to offer judgment-free service as an alternative to traditional banking channels. Their marketing focuses on accessibility and speed rather than credit-building or alternative financial products.

My Texas Payday differentiates itself through its Canadian operational heritage, citing "tens of thousands of satisfied customers" from their Canadian operations. The company emphasizes that financial needs are universal and claims their model is easily transferable across jurisdictions. They position themselves as customer-friendly compared to traditional banks, explicitly mentioning avoidance of "rude treatment from unfriendly bankers."

As a payday lender, this company operates in a high-risk lending category with typically very high APRs (often 400%+ annualized on two-week loans), short repayment terms, and potential for debt cycles. The website provides no disclosure of rates, terms, fees, or APR information, which is a significant red flag. Consumers should carefully review all terms before borrowing and consider whether the emergency need justifies the cost of payday lending.
pros: Online application process for convenience and speed
Physical location in Houston (3100 Timmons Ln) for in-person assistance and questions
Extended hours of operation (8am-8pm, 7 days a week) for accessibility
Direct phone line (832-371-9140) for customer inquiries and support
Established lending operation with 15+ years of experience in Canadian market
Claims of non-judgmental lending approach for consumers rejected by traditional banks
Simple application process positioned as quick and straightforward
cons: No APR, fees, or interest rate information disclosed on website—major transparency gap
No details on loan amounts, repayment terms, or eligibility requirements published
As a payday lender, likely carries extremely high costs typical of the industry (400%+ APR annualized)
Canadian company unfamiliar to Texas market; minimal local track record or reviews available
Physical location does not provide cash—applicants must use online process anyway, limiting utility of in-person visit
best_for: Texans with urgent cash needs who have been denied by traditional banks or credit unions
Borrowers willing to accept high costs for immediate same-day or next-day funding
Consumers who prefer online application but want phone support or in-person assistance
diagnosis: My Texas Payday is designed for Texas consumers facing genuine financial emergencies who need immediate cash and cannot access credit through traditional channels. The critical caveat is that payday loans carry extremely high costs (typically 400%+ APR annualized); the website's complete lack of rate and fee disclosure is a serious red flag. Prospective borrowers must obtain full terms and cost information before applying and should explore alternatives (credit unions, personal loans, assistance programs) first.
services: Fast emergency cash loans (positioning suggests same-day or next-day funding)
In-person application consultation at Houston location
Online loan management and account access
